name: NIST SP 800-115 Technical Guide to Information Security Testing and Assessment

controls.title: Review Techniques
controls.description: Passive examination: documentation, log, ruleset, and system-configuration review, network sniffing, and file integrity checking.

controls.title: Target Identification and Analysis Techniques
controls.description: Network discovery, port and service identification, vulnerability scanning, and wireless scanning.

controls.title: Target Vulnerability Validation Techniques
controls.description: Active validation of vulnerabilities via password cracking, penetration testing, and social engineering.

controls.title: Security Assessment Planning
controls.description: Develop the assessment policy, methodology, rules of engagement, and logistics prior to testing.

controls.title: Security Assessment Execution
controls.description: Conduct the assessment activities to identify vulnerabilities and validate them against the plan.

controls.title: Post-Testing Activities
controls.description: Analysis, reporting, and remediation/mitigation recommendations following assessment execution.
